description: Use evocative, emotionally charged Arabic language that personifies food and appeals to sensory pleasure and desire, creating intimate connection between product and consumer.
structural_recipe: Craft captions using metaphorical and sensory-rich Arabic that describes food with emotional intensity. Use verbs suggesting conquest or captivation (تشقلب, تخطف). Pair with warm emojis (🧡, 😌). Reference emotional states or romantic sentiment. Structure as: [dish name] + [emotional descriptor] + [action verb] + [body part/heart metaphor] + romantic hashtag.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond strongly to emotionally resonant content that elevates everyday consumption to moments of joy and connection. Personifying food as something that 'steals hearts' and 'turns minds' creates psychological engagement. Romantic framing appeals to social bonding and celebration culture. Warm emoji use signals authenticity and genuine passion, building parasocial trust.
transplantation_caveats: Emotional intensity and romantic framing are culturally specific to Saudi market; may seem excessive in Western contexts
Arabic metaphorical language loses impact in translation; requires native fluency to execute authentically
Heart/body-part references should remain tasteful and aligned with local sensitivities around physical description
cultural_constraints: Maintain respectful tone when personifying food; avoid overly sensual language
Romantic framing should evoke family/celebration moments rather than individual indulgence
